name: Balena
description: Balena — IoT fleet management platform that deploys and updates containerized apps on embedded Linux devices.

seo.title: Balena — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Balena: Balena — IoT fleet management platform that deploys and updates containerized apps on embedded Linux devices.

when_to_use: Deploying containerized apps to embedded Linux IoT fleets
Over-the-air OS and app updates for Raspberry Pi devices
Remote device debugging and SSH access at fleet scale
Managing heterogeneous device hardware from one dashboard
Secure rollouts with per-device container version control

review.verdict: The go-to for container-native IoT fleets on Linux, overkill for microcontroller-class hardware.
review.best_for: Teams shipping Docker-based apps to Raspberry Pi or x86 edge devices
review.not_for: ESP32 or low-power MCU fleets where Docker is impractical
